business_goal: Build general brand awareness in the local SME community ahead of entering a new city market.
target_market: SME owners in Lahore, Punjab, across retail and services sectors
current_context: No prior marketing presence in this city. No paid budget approved yet, organic-only campaign for now.
constraints: Must be low-cost, organic content only (no paid ads), focus on LinkedIn and local business communities.

past_campaign_performance.channel: LinkedIn organic + local business Facebook groups
past_campaign_performance.notes: Facebook groups drove more engagement than LinkedIn in that market, worth testing again
